name: Dexus Industria Reit.
analysis: DXI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.4800, stop A$2.2869, target A$3.0593 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
